_README: NetSuite AP push config (mirrors NetSuiteConfig in backend/src/shared/netsuite.ts). NON-SECRET values only. Credentials live in Secrets Manager. Standard invoices map to vendorBill. Proforma invoices map to vendorPrepayment, so prepaymentPaymentAccountId must be the NetSuite bank/credit-card account used to fund the prepayment; prepaymentAccountId optionally overrides the prepayment asset account. Single-subsidiary scaffold: leave subsidiaryId empty/null for non-OneWorld; set it only for a true default OneWorld subsidiary. apAccountId = AP account internal id. defaults.expenseAccountId = line fallback/suspense account. businessUnitSegmentFieldId can be a custom segment field such as cseg_business_unit. Recipient routing maps buyer tax ID/name/entity code/email domain/address text to keys in businessUnits, which can set subsidiary, department, class, location, and custom fields. Empty objects mean nothing resolves and the transform emits warnings/placeholders.
